nodes.label: Screening Pseudo-Technology Claims
nodes.source_file: references/sources/articles/2026-06-17 220242_冰冰小美_今日收盘，有一大堆个股发布澄清公告。因为要打击伪科技。这是提示与撇清关系。所以，审核自己的好企业好股票，是不是这种情况。.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: Clarification announcements amid action against pseudo-technology are presented as a signal to distinguish speculative short-term names from genuine companies.
